channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall but damage appears limited
item.description: Damage from the storm is expected to be minimal due to the El Niño pattern, though warm Atlantic waters may pose risks.

item.title: Trump has campaigned more so far in 2026 midterms than he did at this point in 2018
item.description: President Trump is campaigning more frequently in 2026 than during the same period in 2018, with a rally in Georgia planned.

item.title: States seek to extend Medicaid to prisoners, but federal changes complicate efforts
item.description: Budget cuts and program changes from President Trump's budget law force states to reconsider bipartisan plans to expand Medicaid behind bars.

item.title: Peptides face increased regulatory scrutiny
item.description: An FDA advisory panel meets this week to recommend whether specialized pharmacies should be allowed to produce peptides.
